title: SakonLottery Home Variant 1
prompt:
Title: 2. Ticket Selection Modal
Context: Core Shopping Workflow: Searching to Adding to Cart for SakonLottery.
Description of the screen: Step 2: Number Detail & Quantity Modal. When a user taps a ticket card (e.g., '118 999'), a bottom sheet modal slides up. It shows the number in large bold font, price per ticket, and a quantity selector (Set of 1, 2, 5, 10). Displays 'Available: 45 sets' in green. Features a large red 'Add to Cart' button. High-contrast red/white theme. Variant 2 of 4 in Workflow.
Platform: ios
Form factor: phone
